title: betula × grossii
intro: Betula × grossii, also known as the Silver Birch or Hybrid Silver Birch, is a hybrid plant resulting from the cross between Betula pendula and Betula pubescens, two species of the birch tree. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. Betula × grossii has been shown to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting the immune system. The herbal preparations of Betula × grossii include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the bark, leaves, or roots in hot water or a solvent, and are often used to treat respiratory issues and skin conditions.
